case_title: DISCOVER BANK, ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD VS. MARY HARRISON et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK, ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD AS TO DEFENDANT HARRISON, MARY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-12-2012
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK, ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK, ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD SERVED FEB-17-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HARRISON, MARY
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-14-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION IN RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK, ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK, ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD AS TO DEFENDANT HARRISON, MARY
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-14-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
WAIVER OF ATTORNEY'S FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK, ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $484.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT HARRISON, MARY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK, ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARRISON, MARY $10,256.38 PRINCIPAL, $484.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,740.88, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
